name: Alquiler & Rental
description: Negocios de alquiler de activos: equipos para DJ y eventos, vehículos, maquinaria, espacios, mobiliario, herramientas. Incluye análisis especializado de utilización, amortización, sourcing de activos y competencia local.

biz_evaluator.context: Evaluate rental business viability: asset-heavy model economics, utilization rate dependencies, seasonality risks, and competitive differentiation in the local market. Focus on barriers to entry and fleet scalability.

rental_specialist.context: Deep dive into rental-specific economics: utilization rates, depreciation schedules, maintenance reserves, pricing strategy, fleet management, damage/theft mitigation, and insurance requirements.

sourcing_specialist.context: Find the best sources for the assets to be rented — comparing China (Alibaba, Global Sources), European distributors, and local dealers. Calculate landed cost to the target location and recommend a sourcing mix.

competitor_analyst.context: Map the local rental market: direct competitors (same asset category), indirect competitors (peer-to-peer platforms like Fat Llama, Airbnb for spaces), and pricing benchmarks in the target location.

marketing_strategist.context: Rental marketing strategy: SEO for local search (DJ equipment hire [city]), Google Ads, partnerships with event venues and wedding planners, Instagram for visual assets, and seasonal campaign planning.

cfo_finance.context: Rental financial model: CAPEX for initial fleet, revenue per asset per day, utilization-adjusted revenue forecast, fleet expansion ROI, and cash flow modeling including maintenance reserves and insurance costs.

legal_expert.context: Rental legal requirements: hire agreement terms (liability, damage, deposit), insurance obligations, data protection for customer records, platform liability if marketplace model, and local permits for delivery vehicles.

customer_success.context: Customer retention in rental: repeat booking incentives, loyalty programs, post-rental feedback loops, proactive maintenance communication, and upsell opportunities (accessories, extended hires, priority booking).
